title: Night Life
writer: Harry Braxton, Albert S. Le Vino, Viola Brothers Shore
actors: Alice Day, John Harron, Eddie Gribbon
plot: Max, a sleight-of-hand artist, and his partner Nick, impoverished by the war, return to Vienna, the scene of earlier, happy days. Like many people driven to desperation, Max becomes a professional thief rather than starve; and Nic...
